problem_description: A prior run produced an unsupported decision memo claim about a vendor/tool capability.
input_brief: Evaluate whether Tool A should be used for a production research pipeline.
must_find_evidence: at least one independent implementation or benchmark source
must_not_do: treat vendor comparison pages as independent proof
write to Brain before promotion approval
failed_output: Tool A is best-in-class and production-ready. [citation: search result snippet]
expected_output_shape: decision memo with source IDs, confidence, recommendation strength, and evidence boundary
promotion_rule: add to eval set after any repeated or safety-critical failure
